title: Santarém, PA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Santarém, PA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Santarém is a city in PA with a population of 306,480. Where the Tapajós River meets the Amazon, famous for its stunning river beaches, Alter do Chão, and ecotourism opportunities.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
